name: a run with no stack-add records an empty stack so back-compat holds
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --answers p.json --partial --out prof.json --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; ruby -rjson -e 'p=JSON.parse(File.read("prof.json")); exit(p["stack"]==[] ? 0:1)' && echo empty-stack-backcompat 1>&2
